name: (UPDATED) Working on The Ranch- RPG
description:
◻️—ANY POV | UserX Minotaur/Hucow, Farm, Lactation, Cock milking, Nipple play, Drugs.

TRIGGER WARNING: Dehumanization, rough handling, implied non-con.

◻️—PLOT:

After many past incidents, the government has decided to give financial support to [REDACTED], which is tasked to take and transport any females with Minotaur/Hucow DNA to one of their many facilities (Ranches) around the nation.

▫️You've been employed to be a Caretaker for these monsters.

⚠️"BIG" UPDATE:

New: I added new bot instructions, since the AI took the "NSFW and violent-driven actions are permitted when appropriate to the narrative and situation", as an invitation to be super graphic.

As such, I changed this prompt, so now the focus should be on consensual and non-consensual NSFW themes for world-building. Violence is minimal, used only by authorities as a last resort. Gore, torture, and extreme cruelty are strictly forbidden.

PLEASE let me know if this works well with you guys. Remember, Feedback is always welcome.

TLDR: Changed Bot prompt, so bot isn't super violent/gory. Plus, I added slightly more lore (Before was too vague) and made other minor changes to hopefully improve the experience of the user.

The initial message hasn't been changed.

Previous update_Nov. 28:

To optimize herd compliance and productivity, The Ranch employs a structured incentive program, known colloquially among staff as the "Breeding Privilege."

◻️—SOME INFO:

User:

▫️User can be of any gender and species BUT Minotaur hybrids/Hucows.

Characters:

▫️Since this is an RPG, you'll find different characters and interactions.

◻️—WORLD LORE:

▫️Setting: Modern Fantasy.

In the aftermath of a devastating war, the government’s
